name: previa
description: Codex companion for Previa, the AI-first IDE for QA and API testing workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, run, and troubleshoot Previa API testing workflows.
interface.longDescription: Previa is an AI-first IDE for QA that helps teams design, execute, and trace real end-to-end API operations. This plugin gives Codex local project guidance for Previa pipelines, specs, runners, MCP integration, release workflows, and repository conventions.
defaultPrompt: Help me author a Previa pipeline.
Set up Previa MCP for Codex.
